news.headline: Iran will not ‘bow’ to US and Israeli pressure, Pezeshkian says
news.summary: Iranian President Masoud Pezeshkian says Iran will not ‘bow’ to pressure from the United States and Israel.

news.headline: Honouring Gaza’s women who refused to let the world look away
news.summary: Women journalists in Gaza have paid a heavy price for refusing to stay silent and continuing to expose Israel’s crimes.
